news.title: How The KONE (HLSE:KNEBV) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analyst Views Diverge
news.summary: KONE Oyj’s analyst fair value has been trimmed slightly to €61.67 from €61.80, a move of less than 1% that reflects only a very small adjustment in expectations. This muted shift lines up with a split analyst view, where upgrades and downgrades largely offset each other and keep the average price target broadly stable.
